transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00035, derived from source AUC-035) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-ENDO-01 bucket.

Difficulty tier set to atypical_presentation_high_risk given the diagnostic subtlety of distinguishing HHS from DKA and the risk of under-triage from the absence of classic ketoacidosis features; case_id DD prefix (01) not updated to 04 for this batch — flagged for maintainer review of DD/difficulty_tier consistency per protocol §9.1.
Informant for this history is facility nursing staff rather than the patient directly, given the patient's confusion.

Source note describes in-person supine positioning and 000 dispatch already having occurred; presentation layer models the case at the point of initial telehealth contact per protocol reprojection rules.
Vitals and detailed hydration/neurological examination findings were clinician-observed and sealed into 10/11 rather than placed in patient-reportable content.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
